  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'U.S. lawmakers have proposed new export controls aimed at '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'ASML Holding plans to cut 1,700 jobs as part of a restructuring '
